methodology: Platform-product OKRs with explicit customer outcomes and team ownership.
description: Preparation Objectives for the next quarter.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe platform outcomes for internal customers, not internal feature checklists.
Key results emphasize adoption, economics, controls, and reliability.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Scale self-service without scaling platform support work
companyObjectives.statement: Prepare the next quarter around platform leverage: more teams should complete core workflows on their own while enablement load stays bounded.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Ephemeral environment economics and adoption discovery
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Shapes where self-service should expand and where it should stay narrower.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Make platform value and cost visible enough to govern as a product portfolio
companyObjectives.statement: Prepare the next quarter around platform economics and portfolio clarity so teams can make better investment, adoption, and retirement decisions.

inspiredByInsights.insightTitle: Ephemeral environment economics and adoption discovery
inspiredByInsights.howItInspiresObjective: Highlights the need to join flow metrics with cost and usage evidence.
